_note: SYNTHETIC — produced for IETF 126 hackathon testability; not a production artifact. Labels prefixed 'synth-' throughout. See README.md.
_draft_basis: draft-sato-soos-gar-01 (GAR = Governance Audit Record, SOOS protocol family). Structure follows Section 6.2 SAR fields. 'kernel-attested' = GEC-originated; 'KIA-signed' = signed by GEC keypair per draft-sato-soos-kia.

kernel_attestation._note: SYNTHETIC — in production this field is populated from the GEC attestation chain (RATS Evidence per RFC 9334, extended with SOOS fields). See draft-sato-soos-kia.

kia_signed._note: SYNTHETIC — in production this is an Ed25519 signature by the GEC keypair whose authority is established by the KIA chain (draft-sato-soos-kia). Key material here is a non-functional placeholder.
